name: mostlane-portal-worker
description: Single consolidated Cloudflare Worker + D1 backend for the Mostlane Portal

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/worker.js && cp schema.sql dist/schema.sql && node migrate-json-to-sql.mjs && cp seed.sql dist/seed.sql
scripts.db:seed: node migrate-json-to-sql.mjs && wrangler d1 execute mostlane --file=./seed.sql --remote
